result.description: St. Lawrence is a French-Canadian restaurant located in Vancouver's Railtown neighbourhood. It offers a marriage of classic French cuisine and the gastronomic identity and culture of Les Québécois. The restaurant has a cozy and intimate atmosphere, with a focus on refined dining and exceptional service.
result.address: 269 Powell St, Vancouver, BC V6A 1G3, Canada
result.menu: ['Duck Confit', 'Scallop', 'Beef Tartar', 'Mushroom Lobster Bisque', 'Dry Aged Steak']

result.description: Miku Restaurant opened in Vancouver downtown, specializing in beautifully executed Aburi (flame-seared) sushi and entree dishes. Our new location offers a full bar and lounge area, waterfront patio, private dining room and full-service sushi bar. Executive Chef Kazuhiro Hayashi takes pride in his work, with the freshest ingredients being carefully selected for every dish. Traditional Japanese flavours and techniques are combined with local, west coast elements to create a truly unique dining experience enjoyed by locals and visitors alike.
result.address: 200 Granville Street, Suite 70, Vancouver, BC V6C 1S4
result.hours: Monday to Friday from 11:30 am to 10 pm. Saturday and Sunday from 12 pm to 10 pm.

result.description: Minami is a contemporary Japanese restaurant in Vancouver’s Yaletown neighborhood, offering a combination of Japanese and West Coast cuisine in a comfortable, rustic atmosphere. The restaurant is known for its Aburi take on red meats and seafood dishes, as well as its innovative sushi and seasonal fare.
result.hours: Monday to Sunday 5:00 pm to 9:30 pm
